announcement1.title: Youth Conference Reminder
announcement1.message: The SDA Youth Conference 2026 will be held in Walvis Bay on May 1. Don’t miss it!

announcement2.title: Mission Trip Registration
announcement2.message: Registration for the Oshakati Mission Trip (June 15) is now open. Contact your youth leader.

announcement3.title: Choir Practice
announcement3.message: Youth Choir practice every Wednesday at 18:00 in the church hall.

announcement4.title: Sports Day
announcement4.message: Join us for Youth Sports Day on September 5 at Walvis Bay Stadium.
